zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alicia Fennel於1401年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾利朋時，她的父親Richard Fennel ,of Winslow16歲，母親Margaret Plumton14歲。她於1423年與Sir Richard Pigot在津巴布韋米德藍茲盧曼素利朋結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1460年在英國英格蘭越可爾可洛瑟霍爾享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alicia Fennel于1401年出生在英国英格兰越可爾利朋时，她的父亲Richard Fennel ,of Winslow16岁，母亲Margaret Plumton14岁。她于1423年与Sir Richard Pigot在辛巴威米德藍茲盧曼素利朋结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1460年在英国英格兰越可爾可洛瑟霍爾享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fennel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Fennell  .

variants.name: Fennell
meanings: English: metonymic occupational name for a grower or seller of fennel, from Middle English fenel, finel, finol ‘fennel’ (Old English finugl, from Late Latin fenuculum). Fennel was widely used in the Middle Ages a for its medicinal and culinary uses. The surname may also have been a topographic name for someone who lived near a place where the herb grew or was grown, such as the lost place in or near Litlington and Wilmington (Kent) known only from the early surname forms.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fionnghail ‘descendant of Fionnghal’, a personal name composed of the elements fionn ‘fair, white’ + gal ‘valor’.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Of uncertain origin. If not simply an invention, it may have been devised as a feminine equivalent of   Alan   (of which it is an anagram), or a shortened form of   Alana .  It seems to have been first used by the American film actress  Lana Turner  (  1920–1995 ), whose original name was  Julia .

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisia
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alicia Fennel was born in 1401, in Ripon, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Fennel ,of Winslow, was 16 and her mother, Margaret Plumton, was 14. She married Sir Richard Pigot in 1423, in Ripon, Chirumanzu, Midlands, Zimbabwe. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1460, in Clotherholme, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alicia Fennel est née en 1401, à Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Fennel ,of Winslow, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Margaret Plumton, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Pigot en 1423, à Ripon, Chirumanzu, Midlands, Zimbabwe. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1460, à Clotherholme, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alicia Fennel 1401 in Ripon, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Fennel ,of Winslow 16 und ihre Mutter Margaret Plumton 14. Sie hat 1423 in Ripon, Chirumanzu, Midlands, Simbabwe Sir Richard Pigot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1460 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Clotherholme, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alicia Fennel è nata il nel 1401 nel Ripon, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Fennel ,of Winslow, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Margaret Plumton, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Pigot nel 1423, nel Ripon, Chirumanzu, Midlands, Zimbabwe. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1460, nel Clotherholme, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alicia Fennelが1401年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリプオンで生まれた時，父Richard Fennel ,of Winslowは16歳，母Margaret Plumtonは14歳であった。1423年にジンバブエミドランズチルマンズリプオンでSir Richard Pigotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1460年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクロスエロールメで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alicia Fennel(이)가 1401년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Fennel ,of Winslow(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Plumton(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1423년 짐바브웨 미들랜드즈 치럼아주 리폰에서 Sir Richard Pigot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클로더홀에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alicia Fennel nasceu em 1401, em Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Fennel ,of Winslow, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Plumton, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Pigot em 1423, em Ripon, Chirumanzu, Midlands, Zimbábue. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1460, em Clotherholme, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alicia Fennel родилась в 1401 г. в местности рипон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Fennel ,of Winslow было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Plumton, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Pigot в 1423 г. в местности рипон, чируманзу, мидландс, Зимбабве. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1460 г. в местности клотиролм, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alicia Fennel nació en 1401, en Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Fennel ,of Winslow, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Margaret Plumton, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Pigot en 1423, en Ripon, Chirumanzu, Midlands, Zimbabue. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1460, en Clotherholme, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años.
